attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.ADDITION_BATCH_ID,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.ADJUSTMENT_BATCH_ID,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.CALENDAR_PERIOD_CLOSE_DATE,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.CALENDAR_PERIOD_OPEN_DATE,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.CIP_ADDITION_BATCH_ID,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.CIP_ADJUSTMENT_BATCH_ID,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.CIP_RECLASS_BATCH_ID,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.CIP_RETIREMENT_BATCH_ID,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.CIP_REVAL_BATCH_ID,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.CIP_TRANSFER_BATCH_ID,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.DEFERRED_DEPRN_BATCH_ID,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.DEPRECIATION_BATCH_ID,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.DEPRN_ADJUSTMENT_BATCH_ID,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.DEPRN_RUN,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.FISCAL_YEAR,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.GLOBAL_NAME,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.PERIOD_CLOSE_DATE,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.PERIOD_COUNTER,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.PERIOD_NAME,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.PERIOD_NUM,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.PERIOD_OPEN_DATE,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.RECLASS_BATCH_ID,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.RETIREMENT_BATCH_ID,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.REVAL_BATCH_ID,
MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.TRANSFER_BATCH_ID 
FROM
 MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS WHERE    MF_FA_DEPRN_PERIODS.GES_UPDATE_DATE
>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
